esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
// DML locks usage and limit are in separate TSDB document groups
| WHERE oracledb.dml_locks.usage IS NOT NULL
        AND oracledb.dml_locks.limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(oracledb.dml_locks.usage),
        limit_val = MAX(oracledb.dml_locks.limit)
        BY oracledb.instance.name, host.name
// Exclude unlimited (-1)
| WHERE limit_val > 0
// Utilisation > 85% precedes lock-related errors and transaction queuing
// Adjust threshold to tune sensitivity
| EVAL utilisation_pct = ROUND(usage / limit_val * 100.0, 1)
| WHERE utilisation_pct > 85
| SORT utilisation_pct DESC
